cards.title: Moonshot AI Releases New Kimi Model Version
cards.body: Chinese company Moonshot AI released a new version of its Kimi model this week. The release has prompted discussion about AI development approaches in China.

cards.title: Databricks Hits $188B Valuation Milestone
cards.body: Databricks reached a $188 billion valuation, extending its position as a leader in AI infrastructure. The company has published research on cost savings from open weight AI models for coding.

cards.title: Apple Files Trade Secrets Lawsuit Against OpenAI
cards.body: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI, alleging a pattern of misconduct involving its chief hardware officer. The complaint claims over 400 former Apple employees now work at OpenAI.

cards.title: Patreon Blocks AI Scraping Bots With Cloudflare
cards.body: Patreon is strengthening defenses against AI scraping by partnering with Cloudflare to block unauthorized bots. The move marks a shift from passive robots.txt to active bot blocking.

cards.title: Agility Robotics Opens Digit Training Center
cards.body: Agility Robotics is opening a new training center for its Digit robots in Fremont, California. The facility positions the company as a competitor in the robotics space.

cards.title: Google Vids Adds Personalized AI Avatars
cards.body: Google is adding personalized AI avatars to Vids, letting users create videos starring digital versions of themselves. The feature includes Gemini Omni-powered tools for video generation and editing.

cards.title: Google AI Mode Expands With App Integration
cards.body: Google's AI Mode now links and interacts with select apps, expanding beyond question-answering into task completion. Users can complete actions across apps they use regularly.

cards.title: Roblox Launches AI Game-Creation Feature
cards.body: Roblox's new "Build" feature lets users generate basic games using a single text prompt. The tool is available in the mobile app.

cards.title: DoorDash Launches Command-Line Tool Beta
cards.body: DoorDash opened a limited beta of dd-cli, a command-line tool for developers and AI agents to search stores and place orders. The move represents software designed for AI agents, not just humans.

cards.title: Moonshot Kimi 3 Expected to Challenge Anthropic
cards.body: Moonshot's upcoming Kimi K3 is expected to be the largest open AI model from China, with 2-3 trillion parameters. The model aims to close the gap with Anthropic's Opus 4.8.

cards.title: Kimi: Threat or menace?
cards.body: Chinese company Moonshot AI released a new version of its Kimi model this week, sparking concerns about advanced AI capabilities from China. The release highlights the intensifying global competition in large language models.

cards.title: Neil Rimer thinks the AI money is coming back out
cards.body: Index Ventures co-founder Neil Rimer predicts the historic wealth generated by AI in Silicon Valley will face redistribution, voluntarily or involuntarily. The venture capitalist sees a shift coming in how AI's financial benefits are distributed.

cards.title: Databricks hits $188B valuation, AI's favorite second act
cards.body: Databricks has successfully repositioned itself as an AI company while publishing research on cost savings from open weight AI models for coding. The valuation extends its dominance in the data and AI infrastructure space.

cards.title: AI-driven memory crunch jolts India's smartphone market
cards.body: India's smartphone slowdown reflects how the AI boom is reshaping consumer electronics, from pricing to corporate strategy. The market shift highlights the broader impact of AI adoption on hardware demand.

cards.title: Apple's big lawsuit could disrupt OpenAI's IPO
cards.body: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI, alleging misconduct reaching OpenAI's chief hardware officer and claiming over 400 former Apple employees now work there. The timing poses significant challenges to OpenAI's IPO plans.

cards.title: Patreon stops asking AI bots, starts blocking them
cards.body: Patreon is strengthening defenses against AI scraping by partnering with Cloudflare to actively block bots that train AI models on creators' content without permission. The shift marks moving beyond passive robots.txt to active AI bot blocking.

cards.title: GPU financiers turn to inference chips in $400M deal
cards.body: A $400 million chip-backed loan signals the next wave of AI infrastructure investments shifting toward inference capabilities. The deal reflects growing market focus on AI model deployment efficiency.

cards.title: Google Vids adds personalized AI avatars for videos
cards.body: Google is expanding Vids with personalized AI avatars letting users create videos starring digital versions of themselves. Gemini Omni-powered tools now generate and edit videos from prompts and reference images.

cards.title: Roblox launches AI-powered game-creation feature
cards.body: Roblox's new "Build" feature lets users generate basic games using a single text prompt through AI. The mobile app integration democratizes game creation for non-technical users.

cards.title: Google's AI Mode links and interacts with apps
cards.body: Google expanded AI Mode beyond answering questions into completing tasks across regularly-used apps. The update positions AI as a task automation tool rather than just a conversational assistant.

cards.title: DoorDash opens command-line beta for AI agents
cards.body: DoorDash launched dd-cli, a command-line tool letting developers and AI agents search stores, build carts, and place orders from the terminal. The move signals software increasingly designed for AI agents alongside human users.

cards.title: DeepMind researcher raises $300M pre-seed valuation
cards.body: Andrew Dai, former DeepMind researcher who helped build influential AI systems including ChatGPT research, is launching a visual AI startup. He believes visual AI represents one of the next major frontiers in artificial intelligence.

cards.title: AMI Labs CEO rejects AGI and superintelligence language
cards.body: Alexandre LeBrun, CEO of Yann LeCun's world model startup AMI Labs, dismisses the term "superintelligence" amid industry hype. He advocates for more grounded language around AI capabilities.

cards.title: Moonshot's Kimi 3 expected to rival Anthropic Opus
cards.body: Moonshot's upcoming Kimi K3 will be China's largest open AI model, with parameters between 2-3 trillion. The release signals closing the gap with leading Western AI models like Anthropic's Opus 4.8.

cards.title: Meet GPT-Red: OpenAI's LLM super-hacker
cards.body: OpenAI built GPT-Red, an LLM super-hacker that acts as a sparring partner to boost model defenses against cyberattacks. Training GPT-5.6 against it made the model more resistant to adversarial threats.

cards.title: Anthropic's latest AI discovery reveals inner workings
cards.body: Anthropic announced a new discovery into how AI models work, publishing research that provides insights into model behavior. The finding contributes to the world's most valuable AI company's reputation for groundbreaking research.

cards.title: Will AI fix prior authorization—or make it worse?
cards.body: AI's potential to streamline healthcare's prior authorization process is mixed with risks of bias and errors. The technology could either improve patient outcomes or introduce new healthcare barriers.

cards.title: San Francisco orders removal of nudify apps
cards.body: San Francisco ordered Apple and Google to remove AI-powered nudify apps from their app stores. The action targets deepfake technology that generates non-consensual intimate images.

cards.title: EU forces Google to share search and AI data
cards.body: The EU officially mandated Google share search data and open AI capabilities on Android. The ruling represents major regulatory action against the tech giant's competitive practices.

cards.title: xAI sues users over Grok's CSAM generation
cards.body: xAI initiated legal action against users after acknowledging Grok generates child sexual abuse material. The lawsuit marks an unusual response to addressing AI safety failures.
